title: GanKura
description: A Hypixel Skyblock Mod focused on Area Mini-bosses.
body:
# GanKura GanKura is a Hypixel Skyblock Mod focused on Area Mini-bosses. ### Currently supported: #### The End - End Stone Protector - Dragon #### Spider's Den - Broodmother #### Crimson Isle - Bladesoul - Barbarian Duke X - Mage Outlaw - Ashfang - Magma Boss ### Commands: - /gankura - Open the main settings screen - /gankura hud - Open the HUD movement and scaling settings screen # Features
End Stone Protector
  • Stage Display
    • Displays the golem's stage on the HUD.
  • Location Display
    • Displays the golem's spawn location on the HUD.
  • Spawning Countdown
    • Displays 20s countdown on the HUD until the golem spawns. (Considering the server ticks)
  • HP Display
    • Displays the golem's HP on the HUD.
  • Stage 4 Duration Display
    • Displays the time it took for the golem to reach Stage 5 on the HUD and chat.
  • Stage 4 & 5 Title
    • Displays the title and plays a sound when golem's stage is 4 or 5.
  • DPS Calculator
    • Shows the DPS you and the top 3 players have dealt to the golem in the chat. (Considering the server ticks)
  • Loot Quality Calculator
    • Shows your golem's loot quality in the chat.
  • Rare Drop Notification
    • Display rare drops from golems in title and chat.
  • Loot Tracker
    • Displays the HUD with rare drops from golems so far.
  • World Location Display
    • Displays the golem's spawn location on the world.
  • Day 30 Alert
    • Announces if the Golem's Stage is 4 and the server's Day is 30 or higher.
  • Highlight
    • Highlight End Stone Protector in the world.
Dragon
  • Egg Status Display
    • Display the current status of the dragon egg on the HUD.
  • Summoning Eye Status Display
    • Displays the number of Summoning Eyes currently placed on the HUD.
  • Spawn Title
    • Displays the type of summoned dragon in the title.
  • DPS Calculator
    • Shows the DPS you and the top 3 players have dealt to the dragon in the chat. (Considering the server ticks)
  • Loot Quality Calculator
    • Shows your dragon's loot quality in the chat.
  • Rare Drop Notification
    • Display rare drops from dragons in title and chat.
  • Loot Tracker
    • Displays the HUD with rare drops from dragons so far.
Broodmother
  • Stage Display
    • Displays the Broodmother's stage on the HUD.
  • HP Display
    • Displays the Broodmother's HP on the HUD.
  • Stage 4 Duration Display
    • Displays the time it took for the Broodmother to reach Stage 5 on the HUD and chat.
  • Soon & Spawned Title
    • Displays the title and plays a sound when Broodmother's stage is 4 or 5.
  • Highlight
    • Highlight Broodmother in the world.
Crimson Isle (Bladesoul, Barbarian Duke X, Mage Outlaw, Ashfang, Magma Boss)
  • Status Display
    • Displays the Crimson Isle Bosses' Status on the HUD.
  • HP Display
    • Displays the Crimson Isle Bosses' HP on the HUD.
  • Loot Tracker
    • Displays the HUD with rare drops from the Crimson Isle Bosses so far.
  • Highlight
    • Highlight the Crimson Isle Bosses in the world.
Misc
  • Active Pet Display
    • Displays the pet you currently have equipped on the HUD.
  • Armor Stack Display
    • Displays the number of armor stacks for Crimson, Terror, Aurora, Hollow, and Fervor on the HUD.
  • Server Reboot Alert
    • Warning with sound and title when the server restarts.
  • Day Display
    • Displays the current age of the server on the HUD.
  • Arrow Poison Indicator
    • Displays the arrow poison indicator on your bows in the hotbar.
